novel_features.name: Cross-Sport Dashboard
novel_features.description: See all live games across NFL, NBA, MLB, and NHL in one command
novel_features.rationale: Requires parallel API fetches across sport endpoints that no single tool aggregates

novel_features.name: Full-Text Game Search
novel_features.description: Search your game history by team name, matchup, or venue instantly
novel_features.rationale: Requires FTS5 index across domain-specific event columns in local SQLite

novel_features.name: SQL Query Interface
novel_features.description: Run arbitrary SQL queries against your local sports database
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with domain-specific SQLite tables that extract columns from API JSON

novel_features.name: Win/Loss Streak Analysis
novel_features.description: See any team's current win/loss streak computed from game history
novel_features.rationale: Requires sequential analysis of completed events in local database

novel_features.name: Head-to-Head Records
novel_features.description: Compare historical matchup records between any two teams
novel_features.rationale: Requires cross-referencing home/away team columns across all synced events
